ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the genders table */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the categories table */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the areas table */,
  "marriage_preference_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the marriage_preferences table */,
  "primary_breadwinner_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the family_roles table */,
  "childbearing_intention_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the childbearing_intentions table */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the individual */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the individual */,
  "annual_income" TEXT /* Annual income of the individual */,
  "family_size" INTEGER /* Size of the individual's family */,
  "number_of_children" INTEGER /* Number of children the individual has */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the individual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_childbearing_intention_id FOREIGN KEY ("childbearing_intention_id") REFERENCES childbearing_intentions ("intention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_marriage_preference_id FOREIGN KEY ("marriage_preference_id") REFERENCES marriage_preferences ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_primary_breadwinner_id FOREIGN KEY ("primary_breadwinner_id") REFERENCES family_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the area */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the area */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the area */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marriage_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marriage preference */,
  "preference_name" TEXT /* Name of the marriage preference */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the marriage preference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "family_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the family role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the family role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "childbearing_intentions" (
  "intention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intention */,
  "want_children" TEXT /* Intention to have children */,
  "take_leave_for_child" TEXT /* Intention to take leave for child */,
  "number_of_children_planned" INTEGER /* Number of children planned */,
  "age_planned_for_children" INTEGER /* Age planned for having children */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intention_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Name of the education level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_statuses" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment status */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Name of the employment status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the employment status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the occupation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "individual_education" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the individuals table */,
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the education_levels table */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the individual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id", "education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "individual_employment" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the individuals table */,
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the employment_statuses table */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the individual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id", "employment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "individual_occupation" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the individuals table */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the occupations table */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Occupation of the individual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id", "occupation_id")
)
